products.title: Pole Shelving System
features: This versatile Display System is equally suited for brand retail stores (Clothing, Apparels, Department) as well as walk in wardrobes at home
It's highly flexible design enables to change the combination / layout of display without actually removing the pole systems installed
Multiple Adaptor brackets can be chosen for Hangers, Shelves, Cabinets, Tilting Shelves, etc as per your desired application
Aluminium sections and die cast parts ensures strength and stability
Flexibility to mount the pole from floor to wall / ceiling as per the design requirement
